headline: Microsoft Stock Was Battered by Anthropic’s AI. How a Tie-Up Could Turn the Tables.
summary: Microsoft stock has been hit by the perceived threat from AI but its integration of Anthropic's Claude points to a future of collaboration.

headline: Datadog Launches MCP Server to Provide AI Agents with Secure, Real-Time Access to Unified Observability Data
summary: Datadog MCP Server enables faster debugging, safer automation and governed AI operations at scaleNEW YORK, March 09, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Datadog, Inc., (NASDAQ: DDOG), the AI-powered observability and security platform for cloud applications, today announced that its MCP Server is generally available.
